message:
feat(context): add ntm context inject command for project context injection

Add ability to inject project context files (AGENTS.md, README.md,
.claude/project_context.md) into agent panes at session start.

Features:
- Default context files with silent skip for missing ones
- Custom file list via --files flag
- Size limiting with --max-bytes and graceful truncation handling
- Target specific pane (--pane N) or broadcast to all panes (--all)
- Dry-run mode (--dry-run) for preview without side effects
- JSON output for robot mode integration
- Structured slog logging for pane injection failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
